rationale: The proposed change concerns Tax Code §11.13(b) residence homestead exemption amounts. Fam. Code §53.01 governs juvenile court preliminary investigations and is wholly unrelated; no conflict exists.
quote: On referral of a person believed to be a child or on referral of the person's case to the office or official designated by the juvenile board, the intake officer, probation officer, or other person authorized by the board shall conduct a preliminary investigation
_note: Rule text is from the Family Code juvenile justice title and has no bearing on property tax homestead exemptions.
